mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hlvr_file hf LEFT JOIN hlvr_attachment ha ON hf.id = ha.business_id WHERE ha.del_flag = 0 AND hf.del_flag = 0
and hf.asset_type =#{param.assetType}
select hf.*, ha.name, ha.suffix, ha.`path`, ha.update_name from hlvr_file hf left join hlvr_attachment ha on hf.id =ha.business_id where ha.del_flag =0 and hf.del_flag =0 and hf.id= #{id}
